feature.name: SortedList core
feature.description: Extract SortedList with add/remove/bisect, positional indexing, range iterators, and sublist invariants without importing sortedcontainers.
included_behaviors: maintain sorted order with add/update and duplicate values
bisect_left/bisect_right and count/index on duplicate-heavy lists
positional indexing and slice reads with small load factors
irange/islice inclusive bounds and reverse iteration
sublist merge/delete invariants validated via _check after _reset
excluded_behaviors: SortedKeyList, SortedDict, SortedSet, and key-function variants
benchmarks, upstream tests, docs, and packaging metadata

entanglement.description: SortedList couples sublist splitting, fenwick-style index trees, positional mapping, and delete-merge invariants inside one performance-oriented data structure.
signals: _reset/load factor drives sublist splits and merge behavior on delete
_pos/_loc/_build_index share a segment tree over sublist lengths
irange/islice reuse bisect + positional mapping rather than materializing
_check validates cross-sublist ordering and load-factor invariants

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import SortedList
